mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_MON_USE_RATE_STAT ( BASE_MON , BASE_TYPE , GENDER , AGE_GRP , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , RATE_CNT , CRET_ID , CRET_DT ) SELECT BASE_MON , BASE_TYPE , GENDER , AGE_GRP , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , COUNT(*) , 'SYSTEM' , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT BASE_MON , CASE WHEN OPEN_DT BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') || '01' AND TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE),'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'N' ELSE 'A' END AS BASE_TYPE , GENDER , CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) BETWEEN '1' AND '9' THEN '0' WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) BETWEEN '10' AND '19' THEN '10' WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) BETWEEN '20' AND '29' THEN '20' WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) BETWEEN '30' AND '39' THEN '30' WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) BETWEEN '40' AND '49' THEN '40' WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) BETWEEN '50' AND '59' THEN '50' WHEN TO_NUMBER(AGE) >= '60' THEN '60' ELSE '99' END AS AGE_GRP , RATE_CD , RATE_NM FROM NMCP_MON_USE_RATE_INFO WHERE BASE_MON = #{baseMon} ) GROUP BY BASE_MON, BASE_TYPE, GENDER, AGE_GRP, RATE_CD, RATE_NM
